# NLP2CMD Desktop GUI Automation Demo

**Date:** 2026-02-27 20:08:44  
**Session:** `desktop_gui_demo`  
**Description:** Controlling Linux XFCE desktop via noVNC + Playwright  
**Thumbnail size:** 256px  

---

## Step 01: Connected to XFCE desktop via noVNC

*Time: +3.7s*

![Step 01: Connected to XFCE desktop via noVNC](data:image/png;base64,)

```yaml
url: http://localhost:6080
resolution: 1280x800
protocol: noVNC (websocket → VNC)
```


## Step 02: Opened terminal (Ctrl+Alt+T)

*Time: +5.9s*

![Step 02: Opened terminal (Ctrl+Alt+T)](data:image/png;base64,)


## Step 03: Executed shell command

*Time: +9.1s*

![Step 03: Executed shell command](data:image/png;base64,)


```bash
echo 'Hello from NLP2CMD! Autonomous desktop control.'
```

## Step 04: Opened galculator

*Time: +11.6s*

![Step 04: Opened galculator](data:image/png;base64,)


## Step 05: Calculated 42*137 = 5754

*Time: +13.7s*

![Step 05: Calculated 42*137 = 5754](data:image/png;base64,)

```yaml
expression: 42*137
expected_result: 5754
```


## Step 06: Opened Mousepad text editor (Alt+F2)

*Time: +17.2s*

![Step 06: Opened Mousepad text editor (Alt+F2)](data:image/png;base64,)


## Step 07: Typed document content

*Time: +19.4s*

![Step 07: Typed document content](data:image/png;base64,)


```text
NLP2CMD Desktop Automation Report
==================================

Date: 2026-02-27
System: Linux (XFCE via noVNC)

This document was created autonomously by NLP2CMD.

```

## Step 08: Saved document via Ctrl+S

*Time: +23.1s*

![Step 08: Saved document via Ctrl+S](data:image/png;base64,)

```yaml
filename: /home/nlp2cmd/nlp2cmd_report.txt
```


## Step 09: Opened Thunar file manager

*Time: +27.2s*

![Step 09: Opened Thunar file manager](data:image/png;base64,)

```yaml
path: /home/nlp2cmd
```


## Step 10: Opened Firefox browser

*Time: +34.6s*

![Step 10: Opened Firefox browser](data:image/png;base64,)

```yaml
url: https://github.com/wronai/nlp2cmd
```


## Step 11: Final desktop state

*Time: +36.8s*

![Step 11: Final desktop state](data:image/png;base64,)



---

## Summary

- **Total steps:** 11
- **Total time:** 36.9s
- **Apps controlled:** Terminal, Calculator, Text Editor, File Manager, Firefox
- **Protocol:** Playwright → noVNC (websocket) → TigerVNC → XFCE4
- **OS:** Ubuntu 22.04 in Docker
- **Full screenshots:** `docker/novnc/recordings/desktop_gui_demo_screenshots/`
